title: Y@tuwr #3195
definition:
Jetur = "enclosed"

 1) a son of Ishmael whose descendants warred with Israel east of the
    Jordan
    1a) also called 'Ituraea'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jetur = "enclosed"

 1) a son of Ishmael whose descendants warred with Israel east of the
    Jordan
    1a) also called 'Ituraea'

    NASB:  a son of Ishmael, also his desc. and the region where they lived
